fault_codes.description: SAFETY THERMOSTAT Intervention of the safety thermostat (10)
manufacturer_steps: Press Reset and/or check that the thermostat or its connections are not interrupted.

source_refs.source_quote: 01 SAFETY THERMOSTAT Intervention of the safety thermostat (10) Press Reset and/or check that the thermostat or its connections are not interrupted.

fault_codes.description: BLOCK No gas or failed burner ignition
manufacturer_steps: Check the gas supply or that the ignition/detection electrode is working properly (4).

source_refs.source_quote: 04 BLOCK No gas or failed burner ignition Check the gas supply or that the ignition/detection electrode is working properly (4).

fault_codes.description: High Temperature Boiler temperature too high
manufacturer_steps: Check pump operation and if needed clean the exchanger (24)

source_refs.source_quote: 06 High Temperature Boiler temperature too high Check pump operation and if needed clean the exchanger (24)

fault_codes.description: Water Deficency Insufficient water pressure and consequent intervention of the minimum water pressure pressure switch (13).
manufacturer_steps: Fill the heating circuit as described in chap. 3.8 and wait for the values to return within default limits.
If needed, check the electrical connections and replace the minimum water pressure switch.

source_refs.source_quote: 08 Water Deficency Insufficient water pressure and consequent intervention of the minimum water pressure pressure switch (13). Fill the heating circuit as described in chap. 3.8 and wait for the values to return within default limits. If needed, check the electrical connections and replace the minimum water pressure switch.

manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring, if needed replace outer sensor

source_refs.source_quote: 09 Outer Sensor Check the wiring, if needed replace outer sensor

fault_codes.description: Parasite Flame Flame detected upon ignition
manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring of the Ign/Det. electrode and remove any oxidation.
Check for humidity between drain wire and ceramic, if necessary, replace the electrode, press the unblock key, if the anomaly persists, replace the electrode (4).

source_refs.source_quote: 11 Parasite Flame Flame detected upon ignition Check the wiring of the Ign/Det. electrode and remove any oxidation. Check for humidity between drain wire and ceramic, if necessary, replace the electrode, press the unblock key, if the anomaly persists, replace the electrode (4).

manufacturer_steps: Check the efficiency of the sensor (see table Res/Temp) (Par.4) or its connections.

source_refs.source_quote: 12 Heating Sensor (11) Heating sensor fault Check the efficiency of the sensor (see table Res/Temp) (Par.4) or its connections.

fault_codes.description: Domestic Hot Water Sensor Domestic hot water sensor fault (1)
manufacturer_steps: Check the efficiency of the sensor (see table Res/Temp) (Par.4) or its connections..

source_refs.source_quote: 13 Domestic Hot Water Sensor Domestic hot water sensor fault (1) Check the efficiency of the sensor (see table Res/Temp) (Par.4) or its connections..

manufacturer_steps: Check the efficiency of the sensor / and replace it

source_refs.source_quote: 14 Inlet temperature Sensor (SRR) Check the efficiency of the sensor / and replace it

fault_codes.description: Water circulation insufficent Primary circuit water circulation insufficient (Δt > 35° C)
manufacturer_steps: Check pump operation (12) and speed - remove any heating system obstructions - clean the scaled domestic hot water exchanger

source_refs.source_quote: 15 Water circulation insufficent Primary circuit water circulation insufficient (Δt > 35° C) Check pump operation (12) and speed - remove any heating system obstructions - clean the scaled domestic hot water exchanger

fault_codes.description: Exchanger Freezing (24) Exchanger freezing is detected If the heating sensor detects a temperature below 2° C, burner ignition is inhibited until the sensor detects a temperature above 5°C
manufacturer_steps: Disconnect the from the power supply, close the gas valve, defrost the exchanger carefully.

source_refs.source_quote: 16 Exchanger Freezing (24) Exchanger freezing is detected If the heating sensor detects a temperature below 2° C, burner ignition is inhibited until the sensor detects a temperature above 5°C Disconnect the from the power supply, close the gas valve, defrost the exchanger carefully.

fault_codes.description: Parasite Flame Flame detected after swtich-off
manufacturer_steps: Check the wiring and for any leaks from the gas valve (3), if needed replace the gas valve.

source_refs.source_quote: 20 Parasite Flame Flame detected after swtich-off Check the wiring and for any leaks from the gas valve (3), if needed replace the gas valve.

fault_codes.description: Speed out of control Check fan operation (18) and the connections
manufacturer_steps: Check fan operation (18) and the connections

source_refs.source_quote: 24 Speed out of control Check fan operation (18) and the connections Check fan operation (18) and the connections

fault_codes.description: Speed out of control Alteration of the fan speed; the speed is above that requested
manufacturer_steps: Check fan operation (18) and the connections

source_refs.source_quote: 26 Speed out of control Alteration of the fan speed; the speed is above that requested Check fan operation (18) and the connections

fault_codes.description: Service Parameter Service parameters altered due to possible electromagnetic interferences.
manufacturer_steps: Reset and via Ufly restore the altered parameters

source_refs.source_quote: 30 Service Parameter Service parameters altered due to possible electromagnetic interferences. Reset and via Ufly restore the altered parameters

manufacturer_steps: Correction: if the line voltage is <190 Vac: the line voltage is really below the minimum limit, otherwise the line monitor error: replace BMM

source_refs.source_quote: 32 Low line voltage Correction: if the line voltage is <190 Vac: the line voltage is really below the minimum limit, otherwise the line monitor error: replace BMM

fault_codes.description: Factory Parameters Alteration of the factory parameters due to possible electromagnetic interferences.
manufacturer_steps: Press RESET; if the anomaly persists, replace the board.

source_refs.source_quote: 38 Factory Parameters Alteration of the factory parameters due to possible electromagnetic interferences. Press RESET; if the anomaly persists, replace the board.

fault_codes.description: Water sensor pressure detected if the pressure Transducer is present
manufacturer_steps: Wait for the values to return to default limits / Replace the Transducer

source_refs.source_quote: 44 Water sensor pressure detected if the pressure Transducer is present Wait for the values to return to default limits / Replace the Transducer

fault_codes.description: Water Overheater detected if the H₂O pressure Transducer is present with pressure > 2.5 bar; it is reset automatically when H₂O pressure < 2 bar
manufacturer_steps: Wait for the values to return to default limits / Replace the Transducer

source_refs.source_quote: 45 Water Overheater detected if the H₂O pressure Transducer is present with pressure > 2.5 bar; it is reset automatically when H₂O pressure < 2 bar Wait for the values to return to default limits / Replace the Transducer

fault_codes.description: Short circuit of the iono electrode

source_refs.source_quote: 102 Short circuit of the iono electrode

manufacturer_steps: By pressing reset icon, start the automatic filling, up to a pressure of 1.2 bar (60 sec. max).
If the system does not reach 1.2 bar pressure within 60 seconds, activate the fill manually by pressing LOAD icon.

source_refs.section_title: 3.12.3 - ADAPTATION OF THE POWER TO THE HEATING SYSTEM
source_refs.source_quote: Act on parameter 792 (par. 4.2 SE parameters list) to achieve the value corresponding to the desired output.

source_refs.section_title: 4.3 - ADAPTATION TO THE USE OF OTHER GAS

source_refs.source_quote: 803 Enabled Services: 3 0 3 0: CH & DHW disabled 1: CH enabled 2: DHW enabled 3: CH & DHW enabled
789 Night shift °C 0 0/5 30 0: T.A. 5+30: Value night shift
309 System configurations: 1 1 4 1: W1 2: W2 3: W3 4: W4
848 Dis. local setpoint: 0 0 1 0: bidirectional 1: Only by remote
1 ON ON < 6 °C ON Burner and Pump ON until T > 14°C
2 OFF ON < 2 °C ON Only when both the power supplies are ON: Burner and Pump OFF until T > 5°C When T > 5°C then Burner and Pump ON until T > 14°C.

safety_warnings.text: The instruction booklet is an integral and essential part of the product and must be kept by the user. Read the warnings contained in this instruction booklet carefully as they provide important guidelines regarding installation, use and maintenance safety. Keep the booklet with care for further consultation.

source_refs.source_quote: The instruction booklet is an integral and essential part of the product and must be kept by the user. Read the warnings contained in this instruction booklet carefully as they provide important guidelines regarding installation, use and maintenance safety. Keep the booklet with care for further consultation.

safety_warnings.text: Installation and maintenance must be performed in compliance with the standards in force according to the instructions of the manufacturer, up to standard and by personnel qualified and certified in compliance with law. Systems for the production of domestic hot water MUST be constructed entirely with compliant materials.

source_refs.source_quote: Installation and maintenance must be performed in compliance with the standards in force according to the instructions of the manufacturer, up to standard and by personnel qualified and certified in compliance with law. Systems for the production of domestic hot water MUST be constructed entirely with compliant materials.

safety_warnings.text: By professionally qualified personnel we mean: personnel with specific technical skill in the field of heating system components for civil use, domestic hot water production and maintenance. Personnel must have the qualifications provided for by current legislation.

source_refs.source_quote: By professionally qualified personnel we mean: personnel with specific technical skill in the field of heating system components for civil use, domestic hot water production and maintenance. Personnel must have the qualifications provided for by current legislation.

safety_warnings.text: Incorrect installation or improper maintenance can cause damage to persons, animals or objects for which the manufacturer is not responsible.

source_refs.source_quote: Incorrect installation or improper maintenance can cause damage to persons, animals or objects for which the manufacturer is not responsible.

safety_warnings.text: Before performing any cleaning or maintenance, disconnect the appliance from the energy mains by acting on the switch of the system and/or through the specific cut-off devices.

source_refs.source_quote: Before performing any cleaning or maintenance, disconnect the appliance from the energy mains by acting on the switch of the system and/or through the specific cut-off devices.

safety_warnings.text: In the event of failure and/or malfunctioning of the appliance, switch it off and do not try to repair it or intervene on it directly. Contact only personnel qualified in compliance with law.

source_refs.source_quote: In the event of failure and/or malfunctioning of the appliance, switch it off and do not try to repair it or intervene on it directly. Contact only personnel qualified in compliance with law.

safety_warnings.text: Any repairs must be performed solely by personnel authorised by Unical AG S.p.A., using original spare parts only. Failure to comply with the above can compromise the safety of the boiler and void the warranty.

source_refs.source_quote: Any repairs must be performed solely by personnel authorised by Unical AG S.p.A., using original spare parts only. Failure to comply with the above can compromise the safety of the boiler and void the warranty.

safety_warnings.text: To guarantee appliance efficiency and its correct operation, yearly maintenance must be performed by qualified personnel.

source_refs.source_quote: To guarantee appliance efficiency and its correct operation, yearly maintenance must be performed by qualified personnel.

safety_warnings.text: Should you decide not to use the appliance, parts entailing potential sources of hazard must be made safe.

source_refs.source_quote: Should you decide not to use the appliance, parts entailing potential sources of hazard must be made safe.

safety_warnings.text: Before commissioning an appliance that has not been used, wash the domestic hot water production system, making the water flow until it has been fully replaced.

source_refs.source_quote: Before commissioning an appliance that has not been used, wash the domestic hot water production system, making the water flow until it has been fully replaced.

safety_warnings.text: Should the appliance be sold or transferred to a new owner or if you move and leave the appliance, always make sure that the instruction booklet accompanies it in order to be consulted for the new owner and/or installer.

source_refs.source_quote: Should the appliance be sold or transferred to a new owner or if you move and leave the appliance, always make sure that the instruction booklet accompanies it in order to be consulted for the new owner and/or installer.

safety_warnings.text: Only original accessories must be used for all appliances with optionals or kits (including electric).

source_refs.source_quote: Only original accessories must be used for all appliances with optionals or kits (including electric).

safety_warnings.text: Do not obstruct the terminals of the intake/exhaust ducts.

source_refs.source_quote: Do not obstruct the terminals of the intake/exhaust ducts.

safety_warnings.topic: Serious danger to safety and health
safety_warnings.text: Serious danger to safety and health

source_refs.source_quote: DANGER! Serious danger to safety and health

safety_warnings.topic: Dangerous situation for the product and the environment
safety_warnings.text: Possible dangerous situation for the product and the environment

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! Possible dangerous situation for the product and the environment

safety_warnings.text: The boiler has been built according to the current level of engineering and acknowledged technical safety rules. Nonetheless, if improperly used, dangers could arise for the safety and life of the user and other persons or damage to the equipment or other objects. The appliance is designed to work in heating systems, with hot water circulation, for the production of domestic hot water. Any other use is considered improper. Unical AG S.p.A. will not be held liable for any damage resulting from improper use. Use according to the intended purposes also includes strict compliance with the instructions in this manual.

source_refs.source_quote: The boiler has been built according to the current level of engineering and acknowledged technical safety rules. Nonetheless, if improperly used, dangers could arise for the safety and life of the user and other persons or damage to the equipment or other objects. The appliance is designed to work in heating systems, with hot water circulation, for the production of domestic hot water. Any other use is considered improper. Unical AG S.p.A. will not be held liable for any damage resulting from improper use. Use according to the intended purposes also includes strict compliance with the instructions in this manual.

safety_warnings.text: The manufacturer will not be held liable in the event of damage to persons, animals or objects resulting from failure to comply with the instructions contained in this manual.

source_refs.source_quote: The manufacturer will not be held liable in the event of damage to persons, animals or objects resulting from failure to comply with the instructions contained in this manual.

safety_warnings.text: The boiler cannot be used by children. The boiler can be used by adults and only after having carefully read the user's manual. Children should be supervised to ensure that they do not play or tamper with the device.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! The boiler cannot be used by children. The boiler can be used by adults and only after having carefully read the user's manual. Children should be supervised to ensure that they do not play or tamper with the device.

safety_warnings.text: The appliance must be installed, adjusted and maintained by professionally qualified personnel, in compliance with the standards and provisions in force. Incorrect installation can cause damage to persons, animals and objects for which the manufacturer cannot be held responsible.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! The appliance must be installed, adjusted and maintained by professionally qualified personnel, in compliance with the standards and provisions in force. Incorrect installation can cause damage to persons, animals and objects for which the manufacturer cannot be held responsible.

safety_warnings.text: NEVER attempt performing maintenance or repairs on the boiler on your own initiative. Any work must be done by professionally qualified personnel. We recommend stipulating a maintenance contract. Insufficient or irregular maintenance can jeopardise the operating safety of the appliance and cause damage to persons, animals and objects for which the manufacturer cannot be held responsible.

source_refs.source_quote: DANGER! NEVER attempt performing maintenance or repairs on the boiler on your own initiative. Any work must be done by professionally qualified personnel. We recommend stipulating a maintenance contract. Insufficient or irregular maintenance can jeopardise the operating safety of the appliance and cause damage to persons, animals and objects for which the manufacturer cannot be held responsible.

safety_warnings.text: Do not modify the following parts: the boiler, the gas, air, water and electricity supply lines, the flue gas pipe, the safety valve and the exhaust pipe, the construction parts which affect the operating safety of the appliance

source_refs.source_quote: Changes to the parts connected to the appliance (once the appliance installation is complete) Do not modify the following parts: the boiler the gas, air, water and electricity supply lines the flue gas pipe, the safety valve and the exhaust pipe the construction parts which affect the operating safety of the appliance

safety_warnings.text: To tighten or loosen the screwed fittings, use only appropriate fixed spanners. Incompliant use and/or inappropriate tools can cause damage (e.g. water or gas leakage).

source_refs.source_quote: Attention! To tighten or loosen the screwed fittings, use only appropriate fixed spanners. Incompliant use and/or inappropriate tools can cause damage (e.g. water or gas leakage).

safety_warnings.text: Make sure that the gas tank has been deaerated before installing the appliance. For state-of-the-art tank venting, contact the LPG supplier or person qualified in compliance with the law requirement. If the tank has not been professionally deaerated, ignition problems could arise. In that case, contact the supplier of the LPG tank.

source_refs.source_quote: ATTENTION! Indications for propane gas-fired appliances Make sure that the gas tank has been deaerated before installing the appliance. For state-of-the-art tank venting, contact the LPG supplier or person qualified in compliance with the law requirement. If the tank has not been professionally deaerated, ignition problems could arise. In that case, contact the supplier of the LPG tank.

extraction_notes: Original Gemini response was malformed JSON and was repaired by the pipeline.
overall_confidence was missing or invalid and was set to 0.0 by the pipeline.
